ddls:
CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "game_length" REAL /* Duration of the game in seconds */,
  "game_ended_in_early_surrender" INTEGER /* Indicates if the game ended in an early surrender */,
  "game_ended_in_surrender" INTEGER /* Indicates if the game ended in a surrender */,
  "team_early_surrendered" INTEGER /* Indicates if the team surrendered early */,
  "win" INTEGER /* Indicates if the team won the game */,
  "first_blood_assist" INTEGER /* Indicates if the team assisted in the first blood */,
  "first_blood_kill" INTEGER /* Indicates if the team made the first blood kill */,
  "first_tower_assist" INTEGER /* Indicates if the team assisted in the first tower kill */,
  "first_tower_kill" INTEGER /* Indicates if the team made the first tower kill */,
  "aces_before_15_minutes" INTEGER /* Indicates if the team achieved an ace before 15 minutes */,
  "baron_kills" INTEGER /* Number of Baron kills by the team */,
  "control_wards_placed" INTEGER /* Number of control wards placed by the team */,
  "total_time_spent_dead" REAL /* Total time spent dead by the team in seconds */,
  "time_played" REAL /* Total time played by the team in seconds */,
  "game_mode" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., Ranked, Normal, ARAM) */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Category of the game (e.g., Draft Pick, Blind Pick) */,
  "patch_version" TEXT /* Game patch version */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the match was played */,
  "game_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the game */,
  "game_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the game */,
  "queue_type" TEXT /* Queue type (e.g., Solo, Flex) */,
  "game_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the game provided by the game server */,
  "platform_id" TEXT /* Platform ID where the game was played */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team in a match */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match the team participated in */,
  "team_early_surrendered" INTEGER /* Indicates if the team surrendered early */,
  "win" INTEGER /* Indicates if the team won the game */,
  "baron_kills" INTEGER /* Number of Baron kills by the team */,
  "control_wards_placed" INTEGER /* Number of control wards placed by the team */,
  "aces_before_15_minutes" INTEGER /* Indicates if the team achieved an ace before 15 minutes */,
  "first_blood_assist" INTEGER /* Indicates if the team assisted in the first blood */,
  "first_blood_kill" INTEGER /* Indicates if the team made the first blood kill */,
  "first_tower_assist" INTEGER /* Indicates if the team assisted in the first tower kill */,
  "first_tower_kill" INTEGER /* Indicates if the team made the first tower kill */,
  "total_time_spent_dead" REAL /* Total time spent dead by the team in seconds */,
  "time_played" REAL /* Total time played by the team in seconds */,
  "total_dragons_killed" INTEGER /* Total number of dragons killed by the team */,
  "total_heralds_killed" INTEGER /* Total number of rift heralds killed by the team */,
  "total_turrets_destroyed" INTEGER /* Total number of turrets destroyed by the team */,
  "total_inhibitors_destroyed" INTEGER /* Total number of inhibitors destroyed by the team */,
  "total_damage_dealt_to_champions" REAL /* Total damage dealt to champions by the team */,
  "total_damage_taken_by_champions" REAL /* Total damage taken by champions in the team */,
  "gold_diff_at_10_minutes" REAL /* Gold difference at 10 minutes */,
  "xp_diff_at_10_minutes" REAL /* Experience difference at 10 minutes */,
  "cs_diff_at_10_minutes" REAL /* Creep score difference at 10 minutes */,
  "vision_score" REAL /* Vision score of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "access_level" INTEGER /* Access level of the role (e.g., 1 for admin, 2 for analyst, 3 for user) */,
  "can_view_data" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role can view data */,
  "can_edit_data" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role can edit data */,
  "can_delete_data" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role can delete data */,
  "can_create_reports" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role can create reports */,
  "can_view_private_data" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role can view private data */,
  "can_edit_roles" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role can edit user roles */,
  "can_manage_users" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role can manage user accounts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
